overview: Root-cause functional medicine clinic specializing in personalized hormone care for women navigating perimenopause and menopause using lab-based treatment plans. Also offers men's hormone clinic, midwifery services, and fertility care through both in-person and virtual consultations.
highlights: Midwifery, Fertility, and Home Birth Services
targetAudience: Women in perimenopause and menopause seeking functional medicine hormone care, plus men and those seeking fertility or pregnancy services.
